Mars Oval Sticker

May 11, 2003

stickers & decals

Mars Gusvev Crater an oval bumper sticker. This sticker was done for people who are into space exploration and closely follow various programs. Current Mars Program was an inspiration here. This sticker at times available on ebay.com.
